_comment: ADLC Framework — quality gate config + project-specific tooling. Adjust thresholds per project.

tests._note: Coverage thresholds are aspirational — vitest --coverage is NOT wired into CI yet. Enable instrumentation as a follow-up before enforcing.

security._note: scripts/security/security-scan.sh exists but is NOT wired into CI yet.

type_checking._note: Stricter than ADLC default — pnpm typecheck must pass with zero errors before commit.

git._note: auto_push: false until a remote (e.g. github.com/<owner>/Re-New_Gaslink) is configured. See WI-023.

alerts._note: Telegram alerts via scripts/alerts/telegram.sh require .env.monitor with TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN + TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID.
